query: Group customers into 5 segments based on purchase frequency and spending habits
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | get_features(columns=['recency', 'frequency', 'monetary'])
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_kmeans(
    n_clusters=5,
    algorithm_name='customer_value_segments',
    random_state=42
)

query: Create 3 customer segments based on recency, frequency, and monetary value
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | get_features(columns=['recency', 'frequency', 'monetary'])
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_kmeans(
    n_clusters=3,
    algorithm_name='rfm_segments',
    find_optimal=False,
    random_state=123
)

query: Automatically determine the optimal number of user segments based on engagement metrics
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | get_features(columns=['website_visits', 'session_duration', 'page_views'])
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_kmeans(
    find_optimal=True,
    max_clusters=10,
    algorithm_name='engagement_segments',
    random_state=42
)

query: Create 4 product segments based on sales velocity and profit margin
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | get_features(columns=['sales_velocity', 'profit_margin'])
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_kmeans(
    n_clusters=4,
    algorithm_name='product_performance_segments',
    random_state=99
)

query: Segment website visitors into 6 groups based on browsing behavior and time-on-site
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | get_features(columns=['browsing_pages', 'time_on_site', 'bounce_rate'])
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_kmeans(
    n_clusters=6,

    random_state=555
)

query: Identify outlier user behavior patterns in website navigation data
example:

seg_pipe = seg_pipe | get_features(columns=['navigation_path', 'click_pattern', 'session_duration'])
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_dbscan(
    eps=0.5,
    min_samples=10,
    algorithm_name='navigation_pattern_clusters'
)

seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_dbscan(

query: Form customer segments using hierarchical clustering with complete linkage
example:

seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_agglomerative(
    n_clusters=4,
    linkage='complete',
    algorithm_name='customer_hierarchical_segments'
)

    n_clusters=6,

)

query: Create user segments based on subscription status and activity level
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
rules = {
    'High Value Active': "subscription_tier == 'premium' and activity_score > 8",
    'High Value At Risk': "subscription_tier == 'premium' and activity_score < 3",
    'Growth Potential': "subscription_tier == 'basic' and activity_score > 8",
    'Dormant': "activity_score < 2"
}
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_rule_based(
    rules=rules,
    default_segment='Other',
    algorithm_name='engagement_segments'
)

query: Segment customers into RFM categories using rule-based approach
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
rules = {
    'Champions': "recency_score >= 4 and frequency_score >= 4 and monetary_score >= 4",
    'Loyal Customers': "recency_score >= 3 and frequency_score >= 3 and monetary_score >= 3",
    'At Risk': "recency_score <= 2 and frequency_score >= 3 and monetary_score >= 3",
    'New Customers': "recency_score >= 4 and frequency_score <= 2",
    'Hibernating': "recency_score <= 2 and frequency_score <= 2"
}
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_rule_based(
    rules=rules,
    default_segment='Others',
    algorithm_name='rfm_segments'
)

query: Create product categories based on inventory turnover and profit margin
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
rules = {
    'High Performers': "turnover_ratio > 5 and profit_margin > 0.3",
    'Cash Cows': "turnover_ratio <= 5 and turnover_ratio > 2 and profit_margin > 0.3",
    'Stars': "turnover_ratio > 5 and profit_margin <= 0.3 and profit_margin > 0.15",
    'Dogs': "turnover_ratio <= 2 and profit_margin <= 0.15"
}
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_rule_based(
    rules=rules,
    default_segment='Average Performers',
    algorithm_name='product_performance_segments'
)

query: Segment marketing campaigns based on ROI and audience reach thresholds
example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
rules = {
    'High Impact': "roi > 3 and audience_reach > 100000",
    'Efficient': "roi > 3 and audience_reach <= 100000",
    'Mass Market': "roi <= 3 and roi > 1 and audience_reach > 100000",
    'Underperforming': "roi <= 1"
}
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_rule_based(
    rules=rules,
    default_segment='Neutral',
    algorithm_name='campaign_segments'
)

query: Create customer health score segments based on usage and support interactions

rules.Needs Attention: usage_frequency >= 10 and usage_frequency <= 20 and support_tickets >= 2 and support_tickets <= 3

example:
seg_pipe = SegmentationPipe.from_dataframe(data)
rules = {
    'Healthy': "usage_frequency > 20 and support_tickets < 2",
    'At Risk': "usage_frequency < 10 or (usage_frequency < 20 and support_tickets > 3)",
    'Needs Attention': "usage_frequency >= 10 and usage_frequency <= 20 and support_tickets >= 2 and support_tickets <= 3"
}
seg_pipe = seg_pipe | run_rule_based(
    rules=rules,
    default_segment='Neutral',
    algorithm_name='customer_health_segments'
)
